error {{ error }}

How Stripe payouts work

@for (step of [ {num: '1', title: 'Connect Stripe', desc: 'Click the button above to complete Stripe onboarding.'}, {num: '2', title: 'Earn from Sales', desc: 'ShopZone deducts 10% platform fee from each sale.'}, {num: '3', title: 'Request Payout', desc: 'Request a payout from your wallet when you have funds.'}, {num: '4', title: 'Receive Funds', desc: 'Funds are transferred to your Stripe account within 2–3 days.'}, ]; track step.num) {
{{ step.num }}
{{ step.title }}
{{ step.desc }}
}
}
